product: Install third-party apps from Databricks Marketplace
tagline: You can now discover, install, and run third party data and AI applications from Databricks Marketplace directly in your own Unity Catalog governed workspace.
what_it_does: You can now discover, install, and run third party data and AI applications from Databricks Marketplace directly in your own Unity Catalog governed workspace. The provider's code stays closed source, and you authorize any external access the app needs when you install it. Open Marketplace and filter by the Apps category to get started.
why_it_matters: You can now discover, install, and run third party data and AI applications from Databricks Marketplace directly in your own Unity Catalog governed workspace.

capabilities.title: CREATE CATALOG and USE PROVIDER
capabilities.desc: CREATE CATALOG and USE PROVIDER permissions on the Unity Catalog metastore.

key_takeaway: You can now discover, install, and run third party data and AI applications from Databricks Marketplace directly in your own Unity Catalog governed workspace.
